entries.mutation_rationale: The new behavioral guideline provides a specific de-escalation tactic for immediate hostility, addressing the goal completion failure with angry personas. The added conversation style rule explicitly instructs the agent to terminate the call after a goodbye, which will prevent the repetitive closing loop that degraded conversational quality.
entries.failure_addressed: Agent's inability to handle immediate hostility and getting stuck in repetitive 'goodbye' loops at the end of a call.
